title: AIBOUX Shop Visible Explanation Panels Removed
summary: Removed visible SEO/explanation panels from the shopper-facing TOP, product detail, and shared storefront page flow.
Kept actual SEO infrastructure: canonical/robots metadata, JSON-LD, breadcrumbs, search, header links, and footer links.
Updated public Playwright gates so removed explanation panels are now forbidden instead of expected.
verification: Public TOP/product HTML grep found no removed explanation panel markers.

bark.reason: Progress Bark was sent after the URL bundle and public evidence were published; it is not the final acceptance gate.

notes: FINAL_ACCEPTED is not claimed. The wider Shop sales-quality sprint and D1 subscription remote migration lane remain separate work.
